summary: Frontend verification of the Explainable Allocation Review Layer on AllocationDetail (/allocations/{id}). All 13 acceptance items in the review request were exercised against an existing seeded run (39f66906-7296-4dcc-8ff0-5d99ad1e6ab3) which contained 1 confirmed (Pass-1 exact reference), 1 suggested (Pass-2 debtor name similarity), and 1 unmatched bank row — exactly covering the surfaces the feature targets. Result: feature works end-to-end on the UI side; backend enrichment fields (invoice_amount, invoice_outstanding_before/after, canonical reason) flow through to BankTable and ReviewPanel as designed.

verified_features.table_headers_confirmed_tab: PASS - 'INVOICE AMT', 'ALLOCATED', 'OUTSTANDING', 'MATCH REASON', 'CONF.', 'REVIEW' all rendered (CSS uppercase, source uses correct case)
verified_features.outstanding_before_after_arrow_in_row: PASS - Confirmed row shows '£1,200.00 -> £0.00' with ArrowRight SVG; after value styled emerald (fully allocated). Suggested row shows '£500.00 -> £0.00'.
verified_features.invoice_amt_column_real_value: PASS - Confirmed shows £1,200.00, Suggested shows £500.00 (no dash placeholder)
verified_features.dedicated_review_button: PASS - [data-testid='review-bank-<bankId>'] is present on first exploded row of every bank row in Confirmed/Suggested/Unmatched-Bank tabs and opens the panel
verified_features.review_panel_evidence_labels: PASS - all 5 labels render: 'Status', 'Extracted references', 'Best debtor name similarity', 'Amount balancing', 'Overall reasoning' (CSS uppercase)
verified_features.review_match_card_completeness: PASS - [data-testid='review-match-0'] contains invoice number (INV-5001), debtor (Acme Limited), 'Invoice amount £1,200.00', allocated amount £1,200.00, confidence chip ('high'), 'Outstanding £1,200.00 -> £0.00' with arrow, and canonical reason 'Exact invoice reference detected (\'INV-5001\')'
verified_features.tabs_navigation: PASS - tab-full, tab-partial, tab-unmatched_bank, tab-unmatched_invoice, tab-audit all switch the visible bucket correctly
verified_features.review_button_scope: PASS - [data-testid^='review-bank-'] absent on Unmatched Invoice and Audit Log tabs
verified_features.manual_link_dialog_opens: PASS - [data-testid='link-bank-<id>'] on Unmatched Bank tab opens [data-testid='link-dialog']
verified_features.canonical_reason_vocabulary: PASS (verified Pass1 + Pass2 phrases). Pass1: 'Exact invoice reference detected (\'INV-5001\')'. Pass2: 'Debtor name similarity 90.0% — unique candidate'. Per the new vocab spec the Pass-2 phrase should canonically start with 'Debtor name similarity' which it does. Pass2.5 / partial-ref / manual phrases not present in this seeded run (no rows of those classes) — backend tests already confirm the strings exist server-side.

issues: Table has min-width 1400px and the last cells (Review button) are visually cut off at 1920px because the left sidebar (≈256px) consumes width and a duplicate REVIEW column header appears in addition to the per-row Review button. Functional, but horizontally scrolling is required to see the Review button column without leaning on the row-click affordance. Consider hiding the dedicated REVIEW header column or making the table responsive.

action_items: (Optional UX) Reduce min-width on the bank-table or hide one of the two ways to invoke Review (header column vs row click) so the Review button is visible without horizontal scroll on a 1920px viewport with sidebar open.

(Optional follow-up) Add an explicit fixture/test for Pass-2.5 token-substring and Manual allocation reasons in the UI — the current seeded run had no rows in those classes; backend tests already cover them, but UI rendering of the 'Token-substring match (low confidence — review required)' and 'Manual allocation' canonical phrases is untested in this iteration.
critical_code_review_comments: AllocationDetail.jsx is now ~743 lines — approaching the 700-line threshold. Consider splitting BankTable / ReviewPanel / ManualLinkDialog into their own files for maintainability.
The new ReviewPanel correctly handles missing enrichment fields (renders '—' when invoice_outstanding_before/after are null), which protects older runs from breaking — good defensive coding.
[Minor] In BankTable, when m === null the column slots are filled with 4 '—' placeholders before remaining/reason — header count and tbody td count match (verified visually). No misalignment.
seed_data_creation: Not needed — existing run TEST_strict_884a78 already had 1 full + 1 partial + 1 unmatched_bank row covering all required surfaces.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Explainable Allocation Review Layer is fully wired on the frontend. All testids in the spec exist and behave correctly: row-<bankId>-<idx>, match-<bankId>-<idx>-(invnum|invamt|allocated|outstanding), review-bank-<bankId>, review-panel, review-close, review-match-<n>, link-bank-<id>, link-dialog, tab-full/partial/unmatched_bank/unmatched_invoice/audit. Canonical Pass-1 ('Exact invoice reference detected') and Pass-2 ('Debtor name similarity ...') phrases verified in live UI. Pass-2.5 ('Token-substring match (low confidence — review required)') and Manual allocation phrases only verified via backend tests because no seeded rows of those types exist; create a seed with a single-token-overlap bank reference and/or perform a manual link to surface them on the UI if explicit visual regression is desired.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no defect found in this iteration.
